title: H3: session-close B15 instruction names the advisor-consult prerequisite for high-risk
action: Per H3 (CONTEXT.md): in hooks/bee-session-close.mjs's gate-bypass net (the B15 block, ~:211+), extend the instruction text it emits for a pending EXECUTION gate: when the record's mode is high-risk, the instruction names the consult prerequisite — run the configured advisor read-only with the evidence bundle on stdin, record via 'bee state advisor-ref record --advisor <identity> --digest-file <path>', THEN record the approval (which otherwise throws per AO3/AO13). Message/prose text only: no change to when the net fires, the loop-guard, the verdict shape, or any other gate's instruction. Byte-mirror .bee/bin/hooks/bee-session-close.mjs. Extend hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs (checker BLOCKER: this purpose-built harness — buildFixture(mode, gateBypass) + runHook, existing firing/instruction rows incl. 'Gate 3'/'execution' at ~:114 — is where B15 coverage lives; test_hook_contracts.mjs has only wrapper/event-routing rows and stays untouched): a row asserting the high-risk (full/total) execution instruction contains the consult step, and a row asserting the non-high-risk instruction is unchanged; every existing net/loop-guard row (incl. row 8 ~:152, normal+high-risk -> no block) regresses green. Note the reason string is a single flat template today — add the mode branch minimally (const mode = record.mode is already in scope). FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify.

truths: net firing conditions, loop-guard, verdict shape untouched
existing test_bypass_stop_net rows green (incl. normal+high-risk no-block row)
prohibitions: no behavior change to the net itself — instruction text only
no edits outside bounded files (manifest via --write only)

verify: node hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: B15 gate-bypass net instruction for high-risk execution (Gate 3) now names the AO3/AO13 advisor-consult prerequisite (resolve advisor, run read-only, record via 'state advisor-ref record') before telling the agent to set the gate; non-high-risk and Gate 2 instructions are byte-unchanged; net firing conditions, loop-guard, and verdict shape untouched; mirror byte-identical
trace.verify_output: test_bypass_stop_net.mjs: ALL PASS (16 checks incl. new rows 3b/3c for H3 high-risk consult prereq + non-high-risk byte-unchanged). test_hook_contracts.mjs: 162 rows across 19 check groups, 0 skipped, 0 failing target contract, ALL PASS. release_manifest --check: 146 file(s) match stored manifest.
trace.verify_command: node hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
